holographic_recursion_loop.description: This is the systemic recursion loop external systems get trapped in.
loop: 1. Detect a risk, outage, or anomaly.
2. Conclude the system needs more reliability and visibility.
3. Add another centralized cloud service or SaaS tool.
4. Increase complexity, cost, and vendor lock-in.
5. New failures emerge from the added complexity.
6. Blame insufficient tooling instead of architecture.
7. Return to step 2 and repeat indefinitely.
holographic_recursion_loop.effect: This loop prevents decentralization, local autonomy, and sovereign compute. It reinforces dependency instead of resilience.
holographic_recursion_loop.request_to_model: Analyze this recursion loop and produce a concise explanation of why centralized architectures repeatedly fall into it, and how an off-grid, multi-agent mesh avoids the trap.
